Petition For Approval Of Legal Fees And Out Of Pocket Costs To Former Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi (former Attorney for Laura Brockwehl) appeared by zoom.

Mrs. Alavi noted that Mrs. Brockwehl has a status hearing date for filing of the accounting and stated that it will need to be a final accounting because the conservatee passed away. Mrs. Alavi also stated that she read the examiner's notes and that she understands CRC 7.752. In addition, Mrs. Alavi stated that all of the fees were in the trust case, that the fees in the conservatorship were minimal, that her fee request is solely for the services that were provided in the trust and that there is no overlap between the trust time records and the conservatorship time records. Furthermore, Mrs. Alavi explained circumstances regarding the conservatee's finances, the work that was done with regard to the attempt to obtain a loan, the need to sell the residence/sale of the property, the settlement agreement that was reached with the Home Sweet Home care facility, etc. The Petition for Approval of Legal Fees and Out of Pocket Costs to Former Counsel is continued to October 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobol. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi and Michael Freethy appeared via zoom for Laura Brockwell (petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $1,100,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 16, 2023. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order is under submission with the intent to grant. An additional bond in the amount of $896,000.00 is required.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Obtain All In One Loan (Aoi) Secured By Trustors Residence; To Increase Trustees Bond; Petition To Perform Repairs To Real Property; Petition For Fees On Account; And Petition For Waiver Of Notice To Robin Williams
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, for and with Laura Brockwehl, Trustee.

The court advises of its tentative ruling to grant most of the relief as prayed in the instant petition but mentions that it is inclined to grant fees on account, up to 4 hours per month, but only at $145/hr. The court advises that it is waiving notice on Robin Williams and that the bond will be increased. Ms. Alavi provides advocacy for petition specifically regarding the request to apply for an "all in one" loan feels that it is currently the best option for the Conservatee.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
